issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases for canvas operations.
The provided code examples use Node.js-specific imports, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: gradient-title-watermark
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully meets all rubric requirements, while Response B is almost complete but has minor implementation omissions.

scenarios.name: grayscale-filter
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets the canvas requirement but still uses simple averaging instead of the weighted formula, whereas Response A uses sharp and omits canvas entirely.
